allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.get\('datasets_sidebar',{}\).items\(\) if 'no_data' in k or 'no_filter' in k}, indent=2\)\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.get\('filtering_sidebar',{}\).items\(\) if 'clear' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('jest', {}\), indent=2\)\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts', {}\), indent=2\)\)")
